allow: Bash(python -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(''runpod/analysis/baseline_large_training_log.xlsx''\); ws = wb.active; print\(''Columns:'', [cell.value for cell in next\(ws.iter_rows\(\)\)]\); print\(''Row 2:'', [cell.value for cell in list\(ws.iter_rows\(\)\)[1]]\); print\(''Total rows:'', ws.max_row\)")
